title: Physicians Realty Trust (DOC) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Physicians Realty Trust (NYSE:DOC ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call August 3, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Bradley Page - SVP, General Counsel John Thomas - CEO Jeff Theiler - CFO Mark Theine - EVP, Asset Management Conference Call Participants Regan Sweeney - BMO Capital Markets Nick Joseph - Citi Michael Stroyeck - Green Street Advisors Michael Carroll - RBC Capital Markets Steven Valiquette - Barclays Ronald Camden - Morgan Stanley Michael Gorman - BTIG Mike Miller - JPMorgan Austin Wurschmidt - KeyBanc Capital Markets Inc. Operator Good morning and welcome to the Physicians Realty Trust's Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Call. All participants will be in listen-only mode.

title: Compared to Estimates, Physicians Realty Trust (DOC) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Physicians Realty Trust (DOC) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Physicians Realty Trust (DOC) Meets Q2 FFO Estimates
text: Physicians Realty Trust (DOC) came out with quarterly funds from operations (FFO) of $0.25 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to FFO of $0.27 per share a year ago.

title: Physicians Realty Trust Reports Second Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: MILWAUKEE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Physicians Realty Trust (NYSE: DOC) (the “Company,” the “Trust,” “we,” “our” and “us”), a self-managed health care real estate investment trust, today announced results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2023. John T. Thomas, President and Chief Executive Officer of the Trust, commented, “On July 19, 2023, we celebrated our 10th anniversary.
